_comment: Broken Barrow – Zone 2 Dungeon (Levels 14–18). Goblin/Moribund hybrid stronghold built into a collapsed halfling burial complex.
biome: collapsed halfling barrow, fungal crypts, goblin tunnels, void‑scarred chambers
atmosphere: A shattered halfling burial complex overtaken by goblins, fungal undead, and Moribund cultists. The Void idol buried deep within the barrow warps the dead, the living, and the stone itself.

goblin_clan_ashsnout.description: A brutal goblin clan that discovered the barrow and now mines its relics.
goblin_clan_ashsnout.notes: Use explosives, traps, and swarm tactics.

fungal_undead.description: Halfling dead overtaken by parasitic fungal growths.

moribund_order.description: Void cultists attempting to awaken the idol buried beneath the barrow.
moribund_order.notes: Work alongside goblins but plan to betray them.

wings.description: The shattered entrance of the barrow. Goblin miners and fungal undead clash over exposed relics.
Ancient halfling burial chambers overtaken by fungal growths and Void seepage.
The deepest chamber where the Void idol pulses with corruptive energy.

story_summary: Broken Barrow is a collapsed halfling burial complex overtaken by the Ashsnout goblins and the Moribund Order. A Void idol buried deep within the barrow warps the dead and empowers the cultists. Goblins mine relics for profit, fungal undead roam the crypts, and the Moribund Order prepares a ritual to awaken the idol. Adventurers must navigate unstable tunnels, corrupted crypts, and the idol chamber to stop the awakening.
